About

Software Engineer at SAP, previously at Nokia. BEng in Computers with Electronics from the University of Essex (2019).

Day to day I work with:

  • Python, TypeScript, K8s

Lately I’ve been exploring:

  • Claude Code
  • MCP protocol
  • AI agent skills

Interested in AI, deep learning and building useful things.

I speak Portuguese, Spanish, English
